question: Did Pfizer grow its PPNE between FY20 and FY21?
answer:
Yes, Pfizer grew its Property, Plant and Equipment, net (PPNE) between FY20 and FY21.

Applying the definition of PPNE as the net carrying value on the balance sheet: the Consolidated Balance Sheets and the PP&E note show PP&E increasing from $13,745 million in 2020 to $14,882 million in 2021 [PAGE 59 | CHUNK 3d9c632e] [PAGE 88 | CHUNK 8f0b6ccc].
